{{Quote|The city government has proof that the Kobola crime syndicate has established a presence here on Rori. The Empire has ignored our pleas for help, so we're asking everyone else to help us! Will you help us to rid ourselves of this threat?|A commoner, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ac">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|a commoner|Rori}}</ref>}}
The '''Kobola Miners''' were a dreaded crime organization based on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] and its moon [[Rori/Legends|Rori]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They mined for [[Spice/Legends|spice]] which they sold to various [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] organizations.<ref name="CDHZ" /> They controlled a [[Kobola Spice Mine|spice mine]] on Rori which they used as a bunker.<ref name="SWG:KB" /> The Kobola were on the [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec's]] Most Wanted list of criminals, as they used slavery as a means of extracting spice. They would abduct travelers to Naboo and Rori and force them into doing the mining work. By the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Kobola Miners were frequently at war with the [[Rorgungans]] and the law-abiding miners of the [[Rori Spice Mining Collective]].<ref name="CDHZ" />
